Title: Admin Login - Valid Credentials
Preconditions: Admin URL accessible, valid admin credentials
Steps:
1. Navigate to BACK_URL
2. Enter admin email and password
3. Click Sign In
4. Verify dashboard loads
Expected Result:
- Login form accepts credentials
- Redirected to admin dashboard
- User name displayed
- No console errors

Title: Admin Login - Invalid Credentials
Steps:
1. Navigate to BACK_URL
2. Enter invalid email/password
3. Click Sign In
4. Verify error message
Expected Result:
- Error message displayed
- No redirect to dashboard
- No sensitive info in error
- Login form still functional

Title: Admin Dashboard - Overview Load
Steps:
1. Verify dashboard page loads
2. Check key metrics/widgets display
3. Check navigation menu items
4. Verify no console errors
Expected Result:
- Dashboard renders completely
- Navigation menu shows: Catalog, Orders, Customers, Marketing, Content, Settings
- No JavaScript errors in console
- Page loads within 3 seconds

Title: Admin Catalog - Product List
Steps:
1. Navigate to Catalog > Products
2. Verify product list loads
3. Use search to find a product
4. Apply filters (category, status)
5. Sort by name/date
Expected Result:
- Product list displays with grid/table
- Search returns matching products
- Filters narrow results correctly
- Sort changes product order
- Pagination works

Title: Admin Catalog - Create Product
Preconditions: Admin logged in with catalog permissions
Steps:
1. Navigate to Catalog > Products
2. Click 'Add Product'
3. Fill required fields: Name, SKU, Category
4. Set price
5. Upload product image
6. Save product
7. Verify product in list
Expected Result:
- Product creation form opens
- Required field validation works
- Image upload succeeds
- Product saves without errors
- Product appears in product list
- Product visible on frontend after index

Title: Admin Catalog - Edit Product
Preconditions: Admin logged in, test product exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to product list
2. Open test product for editing
3. Change product name
4. Update description
5. Modify price
6. Save changes
7. Verify changes saved
Expected Result:
- Edit blade opens with product data
- Fields are editable
- Save succeeds
- Changes reflected in product list
- Changes visible on frontend after refresh

Title: Admin Catalog - Manage Categories
Steps:
1. Navigate to Catalog > Categories
2. Expand category tree
3. Select a category
4. View assigned products
5. Check category properties
Expected Result:
- Category tree renders
- Expand/collapse works
- Category details blade opens
- Assigned products listed
- Properties (SEO, images) accessible

Title: Admin Orders - Order List
Steps:
1. Navigate to Orders
2. Verify order list displays
3. Search by order number
4. Filter by status
5. Filter by date range
Expected Result:
- Order list loads with columns (Number, Status, Total, Date)
- Search finds specific order
- Status filter works
- Date range filter works
- Click opens order detail

Title: Admin Orders - View Order Detail
Steps:
1. Open order from list
2. Verify order header (number, status, date)
3. Check line items section
4. Check shipping information
5. Check payment information
6. Verify totals
Expected Result:
- Order detail blade opens
- Line items show product, qty, price
- Shipping address and method displayed
- Payment status shown
- Totals match (subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts = total)

Title: Admin Orders - Change Order Status
Preconditions: Admin logged in, order in 'New' status
Steps:
1. Open order in 'New' status
2. Change status to 'Processing'
3. Save changes
4. Verify status updated
5. Check status change in order history
Expected Result:
- Status dropdown shows valid transitions
- Status changes to 'Processing'
- Save succeeds
- Status change recorded in history
- Invalid transitions not available

Title: Admin Customers - Customer List
Steps:
1. Navigate to Customers > Contacts
2. Verify customer list loads
3. Search by name or email
4. Sort by registration date
Expected Result:
- Customer list displays
- Search returns matching customers
- Sort works correctly
- Click opens customer detail

Title: Admin Customers - View Customer Detail
Steps:
1. Open customer from list
2. Verify contact information
3. Check addresses
4. View order history
5. Check organization membership
Expected Result:
- Customer blade opens
- Name, email, phone displayed
- Addresses listed
- Order history accessible
- Organization shown (if B2B)

Title: Admin Customers - Create Customer
Preconditions: Admin logged in with customer management permissions
Steps:
1. Navigate to Customers
2. Click 'Add Contact'
3. Fill required fields (First Name, Last Name, Email)
4. Set password
5. Save customer
6. Verify in customer list
Expected Result:
- Create form opens
- Required field validation works
- Email uniqueness checked
- Customer saves successfully
- Appears in customer list

Title: Admin Marketing - Promotions List
Steps:
1. Navigate to Marketing > Promotions
2. Verify promotion list loads
3. Check active/inactive filter
4. Open a promotion for detail
Expected Result:
- Promotion list displays
- Active/inactive status shown
- Filter works
- Promotion detail blade opens with conditions and rewards

Title: Admin Marketing - Create Promotion
Preconditions: Admin logged in with marketing permissions
Steps:
1. Navigate to Marketing > Promotions
2. Click 'Add Promotion'
3. Set name and description
4. Configure condition (e.g., cart total > $100)
5. Configure reward (e.g., 10% discount)
6. Set active dates
7. Save and activate
Expected Result:
- Promotion form opens
- Conditions builder works
- Reward configuration works
- Date range set correctly
- Promotion saves and activates
- Discount applies on frontend

Title: Admin Settings - Store Settings
Preconditions: Admin logged in with settings permissions
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings
2. Open Store settings
3. Verify current configuration
4. Check currency settings
5. Check language settings
Expected Result:
- Settings blade opens
- Store name and URL displayed
- Default currency shown
- Available languages listed
- Changes can be saved

Title: Admin Catalog - Inventory Management
Preconditions: Admin logged in, products with inventory
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail
2. Open Inventory section
3. Check stock levels per fulfillment center
4. Update stock quantity
5. Save changes
Expected Result:
- Inventory section shows per-FC stock
- Quantities editable
- Low stock indicators work
- Save updates stock levels
- Changes reflect in API/frontend

Title: Admin - User Roles and Permissions
Preconditions: Admin logged in with user management permissions
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Security > Roles
2. Verify predefined roles exist
3. Open a role to check permissions
4. Create a test role with limited permissions
5. Verify permission restrictions work
Expected Result:
- Roles list shows predefined roles
- Each role has assigned permissions
- New role creation works
- Permission checkboxes functional
- Users with limited roles cannot access restricted sections

Title: Admin - Blade Navigation System
Steps:
1. Open multiple items (product, order, customer)
2. Verify blades stack correctly
3. Navigate between blades
4. Close blades
5. Verify breadcrumb navigation
Expected Result:
- Blades open and stack left-to-right
- Each blade has close button
- Navigation between blades works
- Closing a blade reveals previous
- No orphaned blades remain

Title: Admin - Search Global
Steps:
1. Use global search bar
2. Search for a product name
3. Search for an order number
4. Search for a customer email
5. Verify results categorized
Expected Result:
- Search bar accepts input
- Results appear quickly (<2s)
- Results categorized by type (Products, Orders, Customers)
- Clicking result opens correct blade

Title: Admin - Data Export
Steps:
1. Navigate to Catalog > Products
2. Select multiple products
3. Click Export
4. Choose export format (CSV/JSON)
5. Verify export file generated
Expected Result:
- Export option available
- Format selection works
- File downloads successfully
- File contains selected products
- Data is accurate and complete

Title: Admin - Data Import
Preconditions: Admin logged in, import file prepared
Steps:
1. Navigate to Catalog > Import
2. Upload CSV/JSON file
3. Map columns if required
4. Start import
5. Monitor progress
6. Verify imported data
Expected Result:
- File upload works
- Column mapping interface functional
- Import starts and shows progress
- Data imported correctly
- Errors reported clearly for invalid rows

Title: Admin Console - No JavaScript Errors
Steps:
1. Navigate through main sections: Dashboard, Catalog, Orders, Customers, Marketing, Settings
2. Check browser console at each section
3. Note any errors or warnings
Expected Result:
- No JavaScript errors on any main section
- No failed network requests (4xx/5xx)
- Warnings triaged (no critical warnings)
- All sections load without exceptions

Title: Admin - Session Timeout
Steps:
1. Log in to admin
2. Note session duration settings
3. Leave session idle
4. Attempt action after timeout
5. Verify redirect to login
Expected Result:
- Session has configured timeout
- After timeout, actions redirect to login
- No data loss on timeout
- Session token invalidated
- Re-login required

Title: Admin - Responsive Layout
Preconditions: Admin logged in, various viewport sizes
Steps:
1. View admin at 1920x1080
2. Resize to 1366x768
3. Resize to 1024x768
4. Check blade layout at each size
5. Verify no overflow or broken layout
Expected Result:
- Layout adapts to viewport
- Blades resize appropriately
- Navigation menu collapses if needed
- No horizontal scroll at standard sizes
- Content readable at all tested sizes
